note: Pre-calibration era: gpt-5.4 is the deployment that has scored every session to date. anchorRunId stays null until the first anchor re-score exists.
escalationRule: When calibration-run v1 freezes: (1) set PRISM_DRIFT_HARD=true in prod; (2) any judge deployment change must shadow re-score the fixed anchor set (rater training refs + golden transcripts) and pass conformal recalibration; (3) only then update this file (new deployment + anchorRunId of the re-score) in the same commit as the config change. A drifted judge cannot mint credentials under the hard gate.
